disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Small red spots and pustules just outside the main red patches (satellite lesions)
trigger_question_examples: Are there small separate red spots or little pustules just outside the main rash?
Any tiny spots dotted around the edges?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, there are little red spots and pus-heads dotted just outside the main raw area.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recent broad-spectrum antibiotics and poorly controlled diabetes (precipitants)
trigger_question_examples: Have you had antibiotics recently, and how is your blood sugar control?
Any recent antibiotics or diabetes running high?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I just finished antibiotics for a chest infection and my diabetes has been running high lately.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, spreading hard redness beyond the folds, or thick yellow pus (secondary bacterial infection screen)
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, or redness spreading and hardening beyond the folds, or thick yellow pus?
Is the skin around it getting hot, hard and spreading?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, and the redness isn't spreading hard beyond the folds — the fluid is clear-ish, not thick pus.
